---
title: To create mock up data to use in the other documents
author: Romain Forestier
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{To create mock up data to use in the other documents}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, echo = F, warning = F, message = F, warning = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(eval = T, echo = F, message = F, warning = F)

```

# Operational data

```{r}
cap_dat <- read.csv("/home/romainf/Documents/FisheriesDatabases/operational_captain_longline_logsheet_catch_effort_data_yft_bet_skj_oth.csv")

```

```{r}
# Helper to convert lat/lon back to DDDMM format
decimal_to_dddmm <- function(decimal, is_lon = FALSE) {
  if (is.na(decimal)) return(NA)
  
  if (is_lon && decimal > 180) {
    # Was originally West, convert back
    decimal <- 360 - decimal
    direction <- "W"
  } else if (is_lon) {
    direction <- "E"
  } else {
    direction <- ifelse(decimal < 0, "S", "N")
  }
  
  degrees <- floor(abs(decimal))
  minutes <- (abs(decimal) - degrees) * 60
  
  # Format: DDDMM.MMM or DDMM.MMM
  if (is_lon) {
    dddmm <- sprintf("%03d%05.2f", degrees, minutes)
  } else {
    dddmm <- sprintf("%02d%05.2f", degrees, minutes)
  }
  
  paste0(dddmm, direction)
}

# Generate synthetic captain logsheet data
generate_mock_captain_LL <- function(n_total = 500, stats = NULL) {
  
  # If no stats provided, use reasonable defaults based on lon_range/lat_range
  if (is.null(stats)) {
    stats <- list(
      date_min = as.Date("1960-01-01"),
      date_max = as.Date("2023-12-31"),
      lat_min = -54.5, lat_max = 64.5,
      lon_min = 89.5, lon_max = 288.5,
      effort_mean = 20, effort_sd = 10,
      hbf_mean = 15, hbf_sd = 5,
      catch_mean = 50, catch_sd = 30,
      weight_mean = 2, weight_sd = 1,
      flags = c("JP", "TW", "CN", "US", "AU")
    )
  }
  
  vessel_names <- c("Setosa_I", "Setosa_II", "Versicolor_I", "Versicolor_II", 
                    "Virginica_I", "Virginica_II", "Setosa_III", "Versicolor_III")
  
  # Category sizes
  n_good <- 1335
  n_na <- 30
  n_hbf_outliers <- 20
  n_dummy <- 15
  n_zero <- 20
  n_effort_outliers <- 15
  n_bad_names <- 10
  n_duplicates <- 20
  n_outside_mask <- 20
  n_coord_errors <- 15
  
  # Generate base "good" data
  good_data <- data.frame(
    flag = sample(stats$flags, n_good, replace = TRUE),
    vesselname = sample(vessel_names, n_good, replace = TRUE),
    set_date = sample(seq(stats$date_min, stats$date_max, by = "day"), n_good, replace = TRUE),
    latitude = runif(n_good, stats$lat_min, stats$lat_max),
    longitude = runif(n_good, stats$lon_min, stats$lon_max),
    E = abs(rnorm(n_good, stats$effort_mean, stats$effort_sd)),
    hbf = abs(rnorm(n_good, stats$hbf_mean, stats$hbf_sd)),
    yft_n = rpois(n_good, stats$catch_mean),
    yft_w = abs(rnorm(n_good, stats$weight_mean, stats$weight_sd)),
    skj_n = rpois(n_good, stats$catch_mean * 0.3),
    skj_w = abs(rnorm(n_good, stats$weight_mean * 0.3, stats$weight_sd)),
    bet_n = rpois(n_good, stats$catch_mean * 0.5),
    bet_w = abs(rnorm(n_good, stats$weight_mean * 0.5, stats$weight_sd)),
    alb_n = rpois(n_good, stats$catch_mean * 0.2),
    alb_w = abs(rnorm(n_good, stats$weight_mean * 0.2, stats$weight_sd)),
    oth_n = rpois(n_good, stats$catch_mean * 0.1),
    oth_w = abs(rnorm(n_good, stats$weight_mean * 0.1, stats$weight_sd))
  )
  
  # Convert lat/lon to DDDMM format
  good_data$latitude_dddmm <- sapply(good_data$latitude, decimal_to_dddmm, is_lon = FALSE)
  good_data$longitude_dddmm <- sapply(good_data$longitude, decimal_to_dddmm, is_lon = TRUE)
  
  # NA problems
  na_data <- good_data[1:n_na, ]
  na_fields <- c("set_date", "latitude", "longitude", "E", "yft_n", "skj_n", "bet_n", "alb_n", "oth_n")
  for (i in 1:n_na) {
    na_data[i, sample(na_fields, 1)] <- NA
  }
  
  # HBF outliers - way beyond 3 SD
  hbf_outlier_data <- good_data[1:n_hbf_outliers, ]
  hbf_outlier_data$hbf <- stats$hbf_mean + sample(c(-1, 1), n_hbf_outliers, replace = TRUE) * 
    4 * stats$hbf_sd
  
  # Dummy fisheries
  dummy_data <- good_data[1:n_dummy, ]
  dummy_data$E <- 0
  dummy_data$yft_n <- rpois(n_dummy, stats$catch_mean)
  
  # Zero fisheries
  zero_data <- good_data[1:n_zero, ]
  zero_data$E <- 0
  zero_data$yft_n <- 0
  zero_data$skj_n <- 0
  zero_data$bet_n <- 0
  zero_data$alb_n <- 0
  zero_data$oth_n <- 0
  
  # Effort outliers
  effort_outlier_data <- good_data[1:n_effort_outliers, ]
  effort_outlier_data$E <- stats$effort_mean + sample(c(-1, 1), n_effort_outliers, replace = TRUE) * 
    4 * stats$effort_sd
  
  # Bad vessel names
  name_data <- good_data[1:n_bad_names, ]
  name_data$vesselname <- paste0(name_data$vesselname, "  ")
  
  # Exact duplicates
  dup_data <- good_data[1:(n_duplicates/2), ]
  dup_data <- rbind(dup_data, dup_data)
  
  # Outside mask - obviously wrong coordinates
  outside_data <- good_data[1:n_outside_mask, ]
  # lon < 89.5: Indian Ocean
  outside_data$longitude[1:7] <- runif(7, 40, 85)
  # lon > 288.5: Caribbean/Atlantic
  outside_data$longitude[8:14] <- runif(7, 295, 350)
  # lat < -54.5: Antarctica
  outside_data$latitude[15:17] <- runif(3, -70, -60)
  # lat > 64.5: Arctic
  outside_data$latitude[18:20] <- runif(3, 70, 80)
  
  # Reconvert outside coords to DDDMM
  outside_data$latitude_dddmm <- sapply(outside_data$latitude, decimal_to_dddmm, is_lon = FALSE)
  outside_data$longitude_dddmm <- sapply(outside_data$longitude, decimal_to_dddmm, is_lon = TRUE)
  
  # Bad coordinate formats - comprehensive error examples
n_coord_errors <- 15

# Base data for coordinate errors
coord_error_data <- good_data[1:n_coord_errors, ]

# Assign different coordinate errors (will be applied to latitude_dddmm/longitude_dddmm)
coord_error_data$latitude_dddmm <- c(
  "N",                    # cardinal_only
  "4530X",                # unknown_cardinal  
  "45.30.5N",             # multiple_decimals
  "45A30N",               # invalid_format
  "5N",                   # insufficient_digits
  "4565N",                # minutes_out_of_range (65 minutes)
  "4530E",                # wrong_cardinal_for_type (E on latitude)
  "9530N",                # latitude_out_of_range (95 degrees)
  "",                     # empty string (caught as empty_or_null)
  "12.34.56S",            # multiple_decimals
  "3070N",                # minutes_out_of_range (70 minutes)
  "4530W",                # wrong_cardinal_for_type (W on latitude)
  "2X45N",                # invalid_format
  "S",                    # cardinal_only
  "1234Y"                 # unknown_cardinal
)

coord_error_data$longitude_dddmm <- c(
  "E",                    # cardinal_only
  "12025Z",               # unknown_cardinal
  "120.25.5E",            # multiple_decimals
  "120B25W",              # invalid_format
  "25E",                  # insufficient_digits
  "12065W",               # minutes_out_of_range (65 minutes)
  "12025N",               # wrong_cardinal_for_type (N on longitude)
  "36525E",               # longitude_out_of_range (365 degrees)
  "",                     # empty string
  "150.30.25W",           # multiple_decimals
  "17580E",               # minutes_out_of_range (80 minutes)
  "14530S",               # wrong_cardinal_for_type (S on longitude)
  "1X5025E",              # invalid_format
  "W",                    # cardinal_only
  "9999Q"                 # unknown_cardinal
)

  # Combine all
  all_data <- rbind(
    good_data, na_data, hbf_outlier_data, dummy_data, zero_data,
    effort_outlier_data, name_data, dup_data, outside_data, coord_error_data
  )
  
  # Add estimated values
  all_data$yft_n_est <- ifelse(is.na(all_data$yft_n) | all_data$yft_n == 0, 
                                 rpois(nrow(all_data), 5), NA)
  all_data$skj_n_est <- ifelse(is.na(all_data$skj_n) | all_data$skj_n == 0, 
                                 rpois(nrow(all_data), 3), NA)
  all_data$bet_n_est <- ifelse(is.na(all_data$bet_n) | all_data$bet_n == 0, 
                                 rpois(nrow(all_data), 4), NA)
  all_data$alb_n_est <- ifelse(is.na(all_data$alb_n) | all_data$alb_n == 0, 
                                 rpois(nrow(all_data), 2), NA)
  all_data$oth_n_est <- ifelse(is.na(all_data$oth_n) | all_data$oth_n == 0, 
                                 rpois(nrow(all_data), 1), NA)
  
  # Shuffle
  all_data <- all_data[sample(nrow(all_data)), ]
  
  # Format dates as "1960-10-23 00:00:00.000"
  formatted_dates <- format(all_data$set_date, "%Y-%m-%d 00:00:00.000")
  
  # Create final output
  output_data <- data.frame(
    flag = all_data$flag,
    vesselname = all_data$vesselname,
    latitude = all_data$latitude_dddmm,
    longitude = all_data$longitude_dddmm,
    set_date = formatted_dates,
    hooks_nb = all_data$E * 100,
    hooks_between_floats = all_data$hbf,
    yft_sp_weight_kg = all_data$yft_w * 1000,
    yft_sp_nb = all_data$yft_n,
    yft_sp_nb_est = all_data$yft_n_est,
    skj_sp_weight_kg = all_data$skj_w * 1000,
    skj_sp_nb = all_data$skj_n,
    skj_sp_nb_est = all_data$skj_n_est,
    bet_sp_weight_kg = all_data$bet_w * 1000,
    bet_sp_nb = all_data$bet_n,
    bet_sp_nb_est = all_data$bet_n_est,
    alb_sp_weight_kg = all_data$alb_w * 1000,
    alb_sp_nb = all_data$alb_n,
    alb_sp_nb_est = all_data$alb_n_est,
    oth_sp_weight_kg = all_data$oth_w * 1000,
    oth_sp_nb = all_data$oth_n,
    oth_sp_nb_est = all_data$oth_n_est
  )
  
  return(output_data)
}
```

```{r}
test_data <- generate_mock_captain_LL()
saveRDS(object = test_data, file = "mockData/operational_data.RDS")
```
